description: Intent-only request: classify a cross-session Python tutor as agent-anchored due to persistent memory.

conversation.text: A tutor that helps me learn Python over multiple sessions, remembering what we covered.

processExpectations: The agent explains that cross-session memory of what has been covered combined with ongoing chat interaction is a hallmark of an agent-anchored design.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
